deviceDescription: Opt for the ProtégéTM GPSTM self-expanding peripheral biliary stent system when your work depends on precision, radial strength, and flexibility in treating lesions in the common or external iliac arteries, or in the biliary system.The ProtégéTM GPSTM self-expanding peripheral biliary stent system is indicated for improving luminal diameter in patients with atherosclerotic disease of the common and/or external iliac arteries up to and including 100 mm in length, with reference vessel diameters of 7.5 mm to 11 mm.The stent is intended as a palliative treatment of malignant neoplasms in the biliary tree.
